name: the drafter flags an advisory-style clause as unenforceable needing operator sign-off
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/draft-custom-rule.sh" --rule-id g-y --tool eslint --prose 'The code should read clearly and be pleasant.' --json > d.json 2>e.txt; node -e 'const d=require(process.cwd()+"/d.json");if(d.needs_operator_signoff!==true)process.exit(1);if(d.clauses_unenforceable<1)process.exit(1)' && echo signoff-flagged 1>&2
